# r2rtfExtras

The goal of `r2rtfExtras` is to provide some additional helper functions
to assist in creating RTF output with
[`r2rtf`](https://github.com/Merck/r2rtf/).

The primary wrapper functions are `df_to_rtf` and `fig_to_rtf` which are
opinionated wrappers around boilerplate `r2rtf` code. There are
additional capabilities currently not *yet* built into `r2rtf`. The
[`r2rtf` package](https://github.com/Merck/r2rtf/) remains an amazing
tool for generating output in the RTF format. Make sure to read the
official documentation.

This package is currently under active development.

## Installation

The package can currently be installed from this Github repository using
the following:

    # If needed install.packages("remotes")
    remotes::install_github("Medtronic-Biostatistics/r2rtfExtras")

See the [package
website](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/) for
more details.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`df_to_rtf()`](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/reference/df_to_rtf.md)
  : Output a dataframe to a table in RTF with opinionated formatting.
- [`fig_to_rtf()`](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/reference/fig_to_rtf.md)
  : Output a figure to RTF with opinionated formatting.
- [`rtf_bookmark()`](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/reference/rtf_bookmark.md)
  : Insert an RTF bookmark
- [`rtf_insert_heading()`](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/reference/rtf_insert_heading.md)
  : Transform RTF Title to Heading
- [`rtf_insert_stylesheet_headings()`](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/reference/rtf_insert_stylesheet_headings.md)
  : Insert Stylesheet for Heading into an RTF file
- [`rtf_tabstop()`](https://medtronic-biostatistics.github.io/r2rtfExtras/reference/rtf_tabstop.md)
  : Insert a right-aligned tab stop in the first line of an RTF page
  header or footer
